compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect centrality-aware test gate
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section and quick reference to document centrality-aware test gate behavior, new config keys, and JSONL logging.

**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the centrality scoring feature — config keys, thresholds, logging, graceful degradation — to avoid misconfiguring or misunderstanding the test gate.

**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (architecture section for test gate, config keys reference), any existing docs that reference test gate behavior
- OUT: New documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately documents centrality scoring behavior, config keys (test_gate.centrality_threshold, test_gate.file_count_threshold, test_gate.import_pattern.<lang>), and centrality-log.jsonl logging
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation references stale or inaccurate test gate behavior

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
